name: re-prompt
description: Run re-prompt prompt coaching from inside Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Coach prompt habits from local Codex sessions
interface.longDescription: Use re-prompt from Codex to summarize recent prompt habits, analyze the user's own wording, and rewrite better prompts in the user's voice without uploading raw transcripts.
defaultPrompt: Use re-prompt to review my recent prompt habits
Show me what I should say next time
Rewrite my session prompt in my own voice
